The '''Mrlsst Center for Linguistic Studies''' was a center established on [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] around [[822 BBY]]. It was devoted to creating a database that contained a listing and cross-translation of every form of [[Language/Legends|verbal communication]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was used to train ambassadors and merchants throughout the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] its Academy Head was [[Proctor (Empire Reborn)|Proctor]] [[Cheelka]]. Following several slashes of the [[General Ministry Institutes]] budget, funding came largely from private donations.
